answer: Vietnam's population in 2024 is estimated at 100,987,686, and in 2025, it is projected to be 101,598,527. These figures reflect a gradual increase in population.

results.title: Vietnam Population (1950-2025) - Macrotrends
results.snippet: Total current population for Vietnam in 2025 was 100,103,979, a 0.61% increase from 2024. · Total population for Vietnam in 2024 was 99,497,680, a 0.85% decline

results.title: Total population Vietnam - Statista
results.snippet: The total population of Vietnam stood at 102.3 million people in 2025. Between 1980 and 2025, the total population rose by 48.12 million

results.title: Viet Nam Population 2025 - United Nations Population Fund
results.snippet: Total population in millions, 2025: 101.6. Population annual doubling time, years, 2025: 118. Population aged 0-14, per cent, 2025: 23.
